title: veronica stenophylla var. stenophylla
intro: Veronica stenophylla var. stenophylla, also known as the narrow-leaved speedwell, is a plant species in the Veronica genus. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Veronica stenophylla var. stenophylla include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and improving respiratory function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
